ab: makaya ken a kisedjam ta su paisu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: makaya! uri pida a su kisedjamen?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: malim anga ken a kemacu ta ku paisu, makaya ken a kisedjam ta su paisu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: inika ken a nakemacu ta paisu uta lja!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: malim aken a kemacu ta ku paisu, makaya ken a kisedjam ta su paisu.
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: caqen, katjaisangas ka nakisedjam sun tjanuaken ta paisu inianan ka su pacikeli.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: makaya ken a kisedjam ta su itung?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: ui, alapu a kisumadju.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: makaya ken a kisedjam ta su sunat?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku sinipasedjam anga tjai selep.
en: B:I lent it to selep.

ab: pai pasedjami aken ta su tjukitjuku?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ui, ljakua pacikelu anga nutiav.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: ’emudja’udjalj anga, inika ken a nacemacu ta qausua, pai pasedjami aken ta su qausua?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，請借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: ita sakamaya a ku qausua, pai tja siqausuan a madrusa!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: aicu sunat mavan a su sinipasedjam tjanuaken ka katjaisangas, ku pacikelau tjanusun.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: nu saljinga anan sun a pacun ta sunat makayanan sun a qivu tjanuaken.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: nungida nga ku pacikelen a su paisu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: inika makuda, ’adjavan anga nu izua nga su paisu qivu anga.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: nungida nga su pacikelen a ku paisu?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ku pacikelau anga nutiav.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: nungida nga su pacikelen a ku sunat?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: aicu a inpic sinipasedjam ni kui tjanusun?
en: A: Did Kui lend you this pen?

ab: ui, ku kinisedjam tjaimadju a vuaq.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: aicu a inpic su kinisedjam tjai kui?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Kui?

ab: ini, ti kina a naveneli.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: nekanga nu ’atia, sau kisedjamu tjai pales tu kedri ta ’atia.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's borrow some from Pales.

ab: ui, vaik aken a kisedjam.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: sau djaulju ti pales pacikelu aku paisu ayau.
en: B: Go tell Pales to give me back my money.

ab: pida a kiam nimadju tjanusun?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
